meaning: adj.弄成粉的,有许多小斑点的
examples: She powdered her face and put on her lipstick.
There are only two boxes of powdered milk left.
She powdered her face and applied her lipstick and rouge.
The next hurdle was getting the microscopic particles of powdered insulin into easy-to-handle packages in uniform doses.
At this point, no one can look at an American in a powdered wig without laughing.
